prebuiltIntegrations.displayName: Export Salesforce Opportunities to a Google Sheet
prebuiltIntegrations.description: Periodically exports all Salesforce Opportunities to a Google Sheet.

prebuiltIntegrations.displayName: Create Stripe Customer when a new Shopify Customer is Created
prebuiltIntegrations.description: This webhook-based Integration as API listens for new customer creation events in Shopify and creates a corresponding customer in Stripe.

prebuiltIntegrations.displayName: Create Salesforce Contact and notify Google Chat
prebuiltIntegrations.description: This Integration as API creates a new contact in Salesforce and sends a notification to a Google Chat space.

prebuiltIntegrations.displayName: Send a Google Chat message when a GitHub issue is created
prebuiltIntegrations.description: When an issue is labeled in GitHub, this integration sends a message to a Google Chat space with the issue details.

prebuiltIntegrations.displayName: Send a Slack Message When a Salesforce Opportunity is Closed-Won
prebuiltIntegrations.description: When a Salesforce opportunity is marked as Closed-Won, instantly send a congratulatory Slack message to your sales channel.

prebuiltIntegrations.displayName: Send a Salesforce Performance Summary to Email
prebuiltIntegrations.description: On a given schedule, compile Salesforce sales performance metrics and deliver a summary report via email.

prebuiltIntegrations.displayName: Send a Summary of Jira Tickets via Mailchimp Email
prebuiltIntegrations.description: When scheduled, this fetches open Jira tickets and sends a formatted summary email via Mailchimp.

prebuiltIntegrations.displayName: Send a message to a Slack channel when a Shopify order is made
prebuiltIntegrations.description: When a new Shopify order is placed, automatically post an order notification message to a designated Slack channel.

prebuiltIntegrations.displayName: Update a Google Sheet When a Shopify Order is Created
prebuiltIntegrations.description: When a new Shopify order is placed, automatically append the order details as a new row in a Google Sheet.

prebuiltIntegrations.displayName: Create a Salesforce Contact When a New Shopify Customer Signs Up
prebuiltIntegrations.description: When a new customer signs up on Shopify, automatically create a corresponding contact in Salesforce.

prebuiltIntegrations.displayName: Export Salesforce Leads to a Google Sheet
prebuiltIntegrations.description: Periodically exports all Salesforce Leads to a Google Sheet.

prebuiltIntegrations.displayName: Create a Transaction in QuickBooks When a Shopify Order is Completed
prebuiltIntegrations.description: When a Shopify order is marked as completed, automatically create a corresponding transaction record in QuickBooks.
